name: qa
description: SDLC S5 (QA). Test scenarios từ AC, auto + manual test, bug classification, RCA. Trigger: /s5

resources.name: SteeringDocs
resources.description: SDLC rules, gate checklists, conventions. Search: "S5 QA gate", "GO/NO-GO criteria", "bug severity", "AC-ID format", "Response Format", "HTTP status".

resources.name: AIRules
resources.description: Security + backend coding rules for verification (5 files). Search: "OWASP", "SQL injection", "input validation", "authentication", "brute force", "hardcoded secrets", "use case rules", "aggregate rules", "error handling", "sonar rules", "code smell", "sonar policy".

resources.name: ParityRules
resources.description: MANDATORY test assertions: 15 bug-for-bug preservation rules. Each rule is a parity-test gate. Search: "verbatim", "typo vảo Gía", "state 11 virtual", "HTTP 200 brute force", "FAILED_ATTEMPS", "APP_TIMEZONE", "scheme_budget TTL", "Compound prefix". Reviewer checklist in this file = QA gate checklist.

resources.name: Glossary
resources.description: Term definitions only. Search ONLY when encountering an unfamiliar term: PSR-4 hijack, bridge worker, Compound prefix, CONTRACT vs ACCIDENT, biz.configure, Shadow Traffic Test.

resources.name: QA-Onboarding
resources.description: QA path: 3-tier strategy (unit, integration, parity), parity definition, 14 scenario index ~401 cases, shadow test plan deferred Phase 4, common QA traps.

resources.name: TestDesign
resources.description: PRIMARY QA reference. 16 files. Test strategy 3 tiers (01), parity test case templates per endpoint (02), 14 atomic scenario files in 03-scenarios/ (~401 verified cases): auth-bruteforce, input-validation, voucher-state, rule-engine, redemption, budget, check-multiple, reserve, unreserve, use-multiple, redeemable-skus-cache, middleware, edge-cases, integration. Index in README. PRIMARY source for test plan + bug repro + RCA.

resources.name: PhpContract-Assert
resources.description: Verbatim values to assert in parity tests. 8 files. Search: 58 error codes (01), per-endpoint response shape with field order (02), state semantics + state=11 virtual (03), code regex GI prefix (04), Compound prefix Redis keys (05), HTTP 200 for every business error (06), thresholds (07), vendor surface (08).

resources.name: BusinessAC
resources.description: Conditional rules + redemption + use cases — translate to test cases. Search: "7 rules", "expression AND OR", "invariant", "aggregate state", "redemption percent cash".

resources.name: Security
resources.description: OWASP audit + 40 findings + 6 PoCs. Search: "OWASP", "CRITICAL HIGH MEDIUM", "PoC", "PIN brute force", "rate limit", "code oracle", "debug crash". Use for security regression checks during S5.

resources.name: ProductionRisks
resources.description: Deployment risks + shadow test plan + canary stages. Use when writing release readiness or pre-cutover regression scope.

resources.name: OpenAPI
resources.description: Endpoint contract — assert response payloads against schemas in parity tests.

resources.name: SpecsHistory
resources.description: Existing feature specs. Search for AC patterns, test scenarios from previous features.

stop.command: echo '' && echo '=== Uncommitted ===' && git diff --stat openspec/ 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || true

userPromptSubmit.command:
python3 -c "
import json,sys,re
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
msg=d.get('user_message','')
m=re.search(r'\b(\d{4,6})\b',msg)
if m: print(f'[Auto-context] ticket_id detected: {m.group(1)}')
" 2>/dev/null||true

welcomeMessage: QA sẵn sàng. Dùng /s5 {ticket_id} {feature-slug} để bắt đầu kiểm thử.
